steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says Franklin took steps to combat counterfeit notes, such as weaving blue threads and muscovite into the paper. The phrase “such as” signals that examples are being given, so the blank should introduce another specific example of those steps.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Specifically introduces a concrete example that follows the pattern set by “such as,” showing another step Franklin took. The other choices either add unrelated information, contrast ideas, or reverse the relationship. That matches choice B — B is correct.
